scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/frame-bridge && npm run build -w packages/react-frame-bridge && npm run build -w packages/react-frame-bridge-devtools
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/frame-bridge && npm test -w packages/react-frame-bridge && npm test -w packages/react-frame-bridge-devtools
scripts.release: npm run sync-versions && npm run build && npm test
